title: Repayment not required
doc_html:
§1110.  Repayment not required

No payment on the principal of the scholarship, or the interest thereon shall be required while the recipient is enrolled in medical school, or engaged in internship or residency.  

Added by Acts 1976, No. 130, §1.
doc_text:
§1110.  Repayment not required
No payment on the principal of the scholarship, or the interest thereon shall be required while the recipient is enrolled in medical school, or engaged in internship or residency.
Added by Acts 1976, No. 130, §1.
